name: Neck CT With Contrast
description: Neck CT with intravenous contrast for evaluation of soft tissue structures, lymph nodes, and vasculature

findings.technique: CT of the neck was performed with intravenous contrast from the skull base through the supraclavicular fossae.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Nasopharynx and Oropharynx
sections.content: The nasopharynx and oropharynx demonstrate [no mass / no ulceration / no asymmetry]. The mucosal surfaces are [intact / unremarkable].

sections.name: Tonsils and Adenoids
sections.content: The bilateral tonsils and adenoids demonstrate [no abnormal enlargement / no mass / symmetric]. No suspicious lesion.

sections.name: Salivary Glands
sections.content: The parotid, submandibular, and sublingual glands demonstrate [no mass / no stone / no inflammation]. No salivary gland pathology.

sections.name: Thyroid Gland
sections.content: The thyroid gland demonstrates [no mass / no nodule / no enlargement]. No abnormal enhancement. The gland is [homogeneous / unremarkable].

sections.name: Larynx and Hypopharynx
sections.content: The larynx and hypopharynx demonstrate [no mass / no ulceration / no airway compromise]. The vocal cords are [symmetric / mobile].

sections.name: Cervical Lymph Nodes
sections.content: There are [no pathologically enlarged lymph nodes / no lymphadenopathy]. The cervical lymph node chains are [unremarkable / no abnormal nodes].

sections.name: Carotid Arteries
sections.content: The bilateral internal and common carotid arteries demonstrate [no aneurysm / no stenosis / no dissection]. No atherosclerotic plaque causing significant stenosis.

sections.name: Vertebral Arteries
sections.content: The bilateral vertebral arteries demonstrate [normal caliber / no dissection / no stenosis]. No flow-limiting disease.

sections.name: Internal Jugular Veins
sections.content: The bilateral internal jugular veins are [patent / no thrombosis / no compression]. No internal jugular vein abnormality.

sections.name: Prevertebral and Paraspinal Soft Tissues
sections.content: The prevertebral and paraspinal soft tissues are [unremarkable / no abnormal enhancement / no mass].

impression:
1. Normal contrast-enhanced neck CT.
2. No mass, lymphadenopathy, or vascular abnormality identified.
author: RadReport Templates
